title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Infosys

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Infosys
jsonLd.description:
Infosys has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Indore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Infosys:
Infosys is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Infosys!
